name: momo-agentic
description: A layered, provider-agnostic TypeScript library for building agentic bots on Bun & Node.js — tools, skills, memory, MCP & multi-agent.

scripts.build: bun run build:js && bun run build:types
scripts.build:js: bun run build:js:core && bun run build:js:adapters
scripts.build:js:core: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm && bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/index.cjs --target node --format cjs
scripts.build:js:adapters: bun build ./src/adapters/gemini.ts --outfile ./dist/gemini.js --target node --format esm --external @google/genai && bun build ./src/adapters/gemini.ts --outfile ./dist/gemini.cjs --target node --format cjs --external @google/genai && bun build ./src/adapters/openai.ts --outfile ./dist/openai.js --target node --format esm --external openai && bun build ./src/adapters/openai.ts --outfile ./dist/openai.cjs --target node --format cjs --external openai && bun build ./src/redis/index.ts --outfile ./dist/redis.js --target node --format esm --external ioredis && bun build ./src/redis/index.ts --outfile ./dist/redis.cjs --target node --format cjs --external ioredis && bun build ./src/mongo/index.ts --outfile ./dist/mongo.js --target node --format esm --external mongodb && bun build ./src/mongo/index.ts --outfile ./dist/mongo.cjs --target node --format cjs --external mongodb && bun build ./src/a2a/index.ts --outfile ./dist/a2a.js --target node --format esm && bun build ./src/a2a/index.ts --outfile ./dist/a2a.cjs --target node --format cjs
scripts.test:report: mkdir -p reports/coverage && bun test --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=reports/junit.xml && bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=reports/coverage
scripts.check: biome check --write . && bun run typecheck && bun test
scripts.ci: biome ci . && bun run typecheck && bun test
